name: bhapi-ai-safety-monitor
description: Browser extension for monitoring AI platform usage - Bhapi AI Safety Portal

scripts.pack:chrome: npm run build && node scripts/pack.js chrome
scripts.pack:firefox: npm run build && node scripts/pack.js firefox
scripts.pack:edge: npm run build && node scripts/pack.js edge
scripts.pack:all: npm run build && node scripts/pack.js all
scripts.build:safari: npm run build && cd safari && bash convert.sh
